documentation.description:
GPS sensor input message. This is a raw sensor value sent by the GPS. This
is NOT the global position estimate of the system.

record_types.name: Gps_Input

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: Gps_Id
fields.description: ID of the GPS for multiple GPS inputs

fields.name: Ignore_Flags
fields.description:
Bitmap indicating which GPS input flags fields to ignore. All other
fields must be provided.

fields.name: Time_Week_Ms
fields.description:
Units: [ms]
GPS time (from start of GPS week)

fields.name: Fix_Type
fields.description: 0-1: no fix, 2: 2D fix, 3: 3D fix. 4: 3D with DGPS. 5: 3D with RTK

fields.name: Hdop
fields.description:
GPS HDOP horizontal dilution of position (unitless). If unknown, set
to: UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Vdop
fields.description:
GPS VDOP vertical dilution of position (unitless). If unknown, set
to: UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Vn
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
GPS velocity in north direction in earth-fixed NED frame

fields.name: Ve
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
GPS velocity in east direction in earth-fixed NED frame

fields.name: Vd
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
GPS velocity in down direction in earth-fixed NED frame

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

subprograms.name: Encode
